description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a long, vented barrel with a ribbed top for improved aiming and heat dissipation. The stock and fore-end are crafted from polished wood, displaying a rich brown grain, while the receiver and barrel are finished in matte black metal. The fore-end is ribbed for grip and slides along the barrel, indicating a pump-action mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a single trigger. The overall design is streamlined and functional, with no visible embellishments or attachments. The shotgun's proportions and materials suggest it is intended for practical use, likely in hunting or law enforcement contexts.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a long, vented black barrel and polished wooden stock and fore-end. Features a ribbed fore-end grip and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and vented barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening, ribbed fore-end, and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden stock and fore-end, and the vented barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and fore-end.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing along the top and extended barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
